title: cocotb/verilator interacting weirdly
body:
I have a problem with writing cocotb testbenches with verilator simulation. Here is the cocotb issue but I'm opening this one in case someone might have a comment:

https://github.com/cocotb/cocotb/issues/3616

TLDR: input signals to dut don't update in RTL sim in some cases. I can set them early in the tb and they work but can't update. This only happens in some interfaces, others work properly. Everything is input.
